englishDefinitions: aware of and comfortable with one's own feelings, thoughts, and identity
persianTranslation: با خودِ واقعی‌اش در ارتباط بودن
خودآگاه و متوجه احساسات و هویتش بودن
examples: After a year of traveling alone, he felt more in touch with himself.
Meditation can help you become more in touch with yourself.
She seems very in touch with herself and her goals.
